title: AF Air Duster Sprayduster Compressed Air Can Blower Spray for PC, Laptop keyboard cleaner dust remover PS5 xbox fans 400ml(pack of 2)
features: EFFECTIVE DUST REMOVAL – Quickly blasts away dust, dirt and crumbs from hard-to-reach areas of electronics and office equipment including keyboards, printers, photocopiers, cameras and more.
IDEAL FOR CAR INTERIORS - Perfect for clearing debris from vents, cup holders, dashboards and seats with zero mess.  Always power down equipment and use responsibly.

PRECISE CLEANING POWER – The included extension straw allows for accurate, targeted bursts to dislodge particles from even the tightest crevices. Ideal for delicate areas in your tech or vehicle. Use in short, controlled blasts.

ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLIER – This air duster is HFC free and odourless, helping reduce environmental impact. Strong pressure and flow, only use on powered-down, cooled equipment or in ventilated areas. Safe for car interiors.

ESSENTIAL FOR TECH & VEHICLE CARE – Maintain airflow and prevent dust build-up in laptops, desktop PCs, gaming consoles and other devices. Also helps keep your car interior clean and fresh, no need for brushes or wipes.

TRUSTED QUALITY – AF (Automation Facilities) have been global leaders in specialist cleaning for over 60 years. This twin pack of 400ml cans offers professional-grade performance, trusted by homes, offices and workshops around the world.
description: From the manufacturer Extension Straw Insert the extension straw into the sprayduster nozzle to allow precision when cleaning. Use in short, sharp blasts to clean and remove dust, debris and crumbs from; · PC fans · USB drives · Keyboards · Printers & photocopiers · Ornaments · In-vehicle fans and much more Professional Whether you call them spraydusters, air dusters or compressed gas cans, spraydusters are a staple that any office or engineer should have in their cleaning arsenal. The Sprayduster range from AF are powerful dusters available in flammable or non-flammable and standard or invertible options for use at any angle. All come with extension straws for precision blasting of dust from hard-to-reach spaces. Common Myth's - An "airduster" is NOT compressed air! - it is compressed gas (in liquid form) - Don't shake before use! so easy to do, but pointless with a sprayduster! if anything, it reduces performance! - This can sprays liquid! - this is most commonly caused by spraying for too long which makes condensation. use short, sharp blasts Isopropanol Label Remover Screen Cleaning Wipes Screen Cleaner Sprays Whiteboard Cleaner Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 463 4.6 out of 5 stars 492 4.0 out of 5 stars 1,442 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,381 4.3 out of 5 stars 643 Price £11.11 £ 11 . 11 £10.55 £ 10 . 55 £6.30 £ 6 . 30 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £8.74 £ 8 . 74 Why not try one of AF's other popular products? - AF Lab grade Isopropanol products are an ideal addition to your office or workshop. 99.7% pure ISO is suitable for a huge range of technical, or day to day cleaning and degreasing applications. AF Label-clene makes removing those pesky labels a breeze! Simply apply a little LCL, let it soak and slide the label right off! No more picking at labels! This is a must-have in any office. Screen-Clene wipes are paper based wipes impregnated with a specialist screen cleaning solution which is safe to use on most screens removing fingerprints, grime and grease and leaving your Tech smear-free. Multi-Screen Clene is a fantastic addition to your cleaning arsenal. Not only is it suitable for cleaning most types of screens, but it's also great on mirrors and other glass to remove marks, grease and smears. Whiteboard Clene is a specialist cleaner formulated to leave your whiteboard sparkling with regular use. This formulation is not simply an alcohol mix, buthas been carefully formulated for use on enamel whiteboards.
